snippet.title: Sia - Cheap Thrills ft. Sean Paul 🌟 (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Cheap Thrills by Sia featuring Sean Paul is an upbeat anthem about having fun without needing money or luxury. 🎶💃 The song celebrates dancing, freedom, and enjoying the moment with friends. Its catchy rhythm and joyful energy make it all about good vibes and living in the now. 🌟🕺

Rock with it girl

Dance with it girl

snippet.title: GODZILLA MINUS ZERO | First Look Teaser
snippet.description:
GODZILLA MINUS ZERO
VFX, Written, and Directed by Takashi Yamazaki
In theatres November 6
Follow @godzilla_toho and @GKIDSfilms for more updates!
godzillaminuszero.com

GODZILLA MINUS ZERO picks up in 1949, two years after the tumultuous events of Godzilla Minus One, and continues the story of the Shikishima family as they face an all-new calamity. Additionally confirmed out of CinemaCon, Ryunosuke Kamiki, the hero who faced Godzilla’s terror in Godzilla Minus One, returns as Koichi Shikishima, and is joined by Minami Hamabe as Noriko Oishi, who miraculously survived Godzilla’s first attack on Tokyo.

As a project Filmed For IMAX, GODZILLA MINUS ZERO was shot with high-definition digital cameras certified by IMAX, and optimized in sound and imagery unique to IMAX screens. Fans can look forward to seeing Godzilla presented to all new terrifying heights, making GODZILLA MINUS ZERO in a true cinematic event not to be missed.

Godzilla Store: https://godzilla.com/collections/all

snippet.title: Black Cat: The Master Thief| Character Reveal Trailer | Marvel Rivals
snippet.description:
Cross her path and your luck runs out! 🍀

One of the world's premier thieves, Felicia Hardy glides across the battlefield with swift precision and a dancer's grace, ever ready to purloin an opponent's fortune. Those who meet the Black Cat's gaze should beware, as her omens never miss their mark!

Felicia Hardy is one of the most notorious thieves in the world. Once the Black Cat has her eyes on a prize, it's already as good as gone. This is one feline femme fatale you don't want to cross... because luck is always on her side!

The Black Cat was recruited by Wilson Fisk to infiltrate Doctor Strange's Sanctum Sanctorum and steal the Tablet of Life and Time. However, while Kingpin sought to harness its ancient power to counter Alchemax by making a deal with the Gilded Saint, she hatched a plan of her own to free his captives. Let the double cross commence!

Season 7.5 arrives on April 17, 2026

Keep your eyes on the prize, because this cat always lands on her feet.

snippet.title: INSIDIOUS: OUT OF THE FURTHER - Official Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
The Further comes for our world. 
Watch the official trailer for #Insidious: Out Of The Further - exclusively in theatres this August.


Follow us on social: 
https://www.instagram.com/InsidiousMovie   
https://twitter.com/InsidiousMovie  
https://www.facebook.com/InsidiousMovie  

Visit our site: https://insidious.movie 
Subscribe for more exclusive content: https://www.youtube.com/sonypictures 

Having earned over $740 million at the global box office, the Insidious franchise returns with a new family and a terror that redefines what The Further is capable of.
 
In Insidious: Out of the Further, Amelia Eve stars as Gemma, a young mother raising her daughter in the house she grew up in who discovers she can travel into The Further, the purgatorial realm of lost souls at the heart of the Insidious universe. When something evil comes after her, Gemma discovers an ability that changes everything: she doesn’t just enter The Further, she can bring what lives there back to the real world. Once the demons realize her power, our world becomes their playground.
 
With Lin Shaye reprising her iconic role as Elise Rainier and Jacob Chase (Come Play) directing, Insidious: Out of the Further opens August 21, 2026. Screenplay by Jacob Chase. Story by David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick and Jacob Chase.      
 
Directed by:

snippet.title: Focker-In-Law | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
The circle of trust just got bigger. Focker-In-Law is in theaters this Thanksgiving. 
 ______  

This November, comedy icon and Emmy winner Ben Stiller and two-time Oscar® winner Robert De Niro reunite, joined by Grammy winner and Oscar® nominee Ariana Grande, in Focker-In-Law, a new chapter in the blockbuster Meet the Parents franchise.
 
Written and directed by John Hamburg, who co-wrote the three previous Meet the Parents films, Focker-In-Law is produced by Oscar® nominee Jane Rosenthal and Robert De Niro for Tribeca Productions; Ben Stiller and Oscar® winner John Lesher for Red Hour Films; Emmy winner Jay Roach for Delirious Media; and John Hamburg for Particular Pictures.


Find Focker-In-Law on Instagram at https://www.instagram.com/fockerinlaw/
Follow Focker-In-Law on Facebook at  https://www.facebook.com/fockerinlaw/
Follow Focker-In-Law on X at https://twitter.com/fockerinlaw
Follow Focker-In-Law on TikTok at https://www.tiktok.com/@fockerinlaw
https://www.fockerinlaw.com 

Genre: Comedy
Cast: Robert De Niro, Ben Stiller, Ariana Grande, Owen Wilson, Blythe Danner, Teri Polo, Skyler Gisondo, Beanie Feldstein, Eduardo Franco
Written and directed by: John Hamburg
Producers:Jane Rosenthal, Robert De Niro, Ben Stiller, John Lesher, Jay Roach, John Hamburg

snippet.title: รวมเพลงเก่า เพราะๆ ฟังสบาย 🎸 Acoustic Cover Playlist
snippet.description:
รวมเพลงเก่าเพราะๆ ฟังสบาย ที่หลายคนยังคิดถึง 🎶
นำกลับมาถ่ายทอดใหม่ในเวอร์ชัน Acoustic Guitar Cover ให้บรรยากาศอบอุ่น ละมุน และฟังเพลินตลอดทั้งเพลย์ลิสต์ 🌿✨

บทเพลงดังในอดีตถูกเรียบเรียงใหม่ในสไตล์อะคูสติก ฟังง่าย สบายๆ ผสมผสานเสียงกีตาร์นุ่มๆ กับการถ่ายทอดอารมณ์ที่อบอุ่น เหมาะสำหรับเปิดคลอในทุกช่วงเวลา

💖 เหมาะสำหรับ:
• เปิดฟังในร้านกาแฟ / ร้านอาหาร
• เพลงเปิดร้าน / เปิดทำงาน
• ฟังชิลๆ ระหว่างพักผ่อน
• ฟังก่อนนอนแบบสบายๆ
• คนที่คิดถึงเพลงเก่าในความทรงจำ

🎶 รวมเพลงในคลิป:
00:00 ใจเอย
03:21 ความลับ
06:11 ถ้าคิดถึงเธอมากกว่านี้
10:22 เจ็บนิดเดียว
14:01 เธอจะเลือกใคร
17:26 เพียงแค่ใจเรารักกัน
21:07 เรารักกันไม่ได้
25:40 แพ้ใจ
29:32 แสนรัก
33:18 ไม่เป็นรอง
38:09 ไม่ต่างกัน
41:47 กอดฉัน
46:05 ขอเพียงที่พักใจ
51:03 ขีดเส้นใต้
55:28 ครึ่งใจ
59:23 ซ้ำคือเรา
01:03:25 ทางรักสีดำ
01:07:35 พรหมลิขิต
01:12:04 ยอมจำนนฟ้าดิน
01:15:11 รักเธอให้น้อยลง
01:19:21 รักเธอที่สุด
01:23:56 ว่าว
01:27:53 สงสารกันหน่อย
01:31:45 หนึ่งในไม่กี่คน
01:36:14 หลับตา
01:40:23 องศาที่ต่างกัน
01:44:47 อยากเก็บเธอไว้ทั้งสองคน
01:50:09 อยู่นานๆ ได้ไหม

✨ ปล่อยใจไปกับเสียงดนตรีเบาๆ และความทรงจำดีๆ ที่ไม่มีวันเก่า
เหมาะสำหรับทุกช่วงเวลาที่คุณต้องการความสงบและความอบอุ่น 💛

👍 ถ้าชอบเพลงแนวนี้ อย่าลืมกด Like / Subscribe / Share เพื่อเป็นกำลังใจให้ด้วยนะครับ

snippet.title: 24 ชั่วโมง ในฐานลับใต้สถานีตำรวจ! พี่ฝนปุ๊กปิ๊ก หนีซอมบี้พี่เอก 🧟‍♂️👮‍♂️ ใน Brookhaven 🏡RP
snippet.description:
พี่ฝน พี่เอก และปุ๊กปิ๊ก กลับมาพร้อมภารกิจสุดระทึกในเกม Roblox Brookhaven 🏡RP! เมื่อจู่ๆ มี "อุกกาบาตลึกลับ" ตกตกลงมากลางเมืองบรู๊คเฮเวน ทำให้พี่เอกที่อยู่ใกล้ๆ กลายร่างเป็น ซอมบี้! 🧟‍♂️😱
พี่ฝนและปุ๊กปิ๊กต้องรีบหาทางเอาชีวิตรอด โดยการบุกเข้าไปสร้าง "ฐานทัพลับใต้สถานีตำรวจ" เพื่อใช้เป็นที่หลบภัยชั่วคราว งานนี้ทั้งคู่จะเอาตัวรอดจากซอมบี้พี่เอกได้หรือไม่?  มาลุ้นไปพร้อมกันเลย!

ชื่อเกมส์จ้า Roblox: Brookhaven 🏡RP

snippet.title: Tame Impala - Dracula (JENNIE Remix) (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
╰┈➤ Dive into the lyrics of “Dracula” — a space where every word feels like it was written just for you.
Here, music is more than sound — it’s memories, emotions, and little moments that stay with us.

Tame Impala - Dracula (JENNIE Remix) (Lyrics) ▶︎ •၊၊||၊|။||||။၊|• 3:40
#TameImpalaJENNIE

╰┈➤ On this channel, you’ll find songs that feel straight out of an indie film: timeless classics and hidden gems waiting to become your new favorites.

If this song kept you company today:
💌 Share it with someone who needs it
⭐ Subscribe and keep this little corner saved for whenever you want to come back
🫰 Leave a comment telling us which song moves your heart

⤷ ゛follow Tame Impalaˎˊ˗

｡･:*˚:✧｡ ｡･:*˚:✧｡ ｡･:*˚:✧｡｡･:*˚:✧｡｡･:*˚:✧｡

Lyrics:
[Intro: Tame Impala & JENNIE]
Oh (You and me)
Oh (Hahaha)
(Check it out now)
(Hahaha, mm)
(Dracula)
(Ba-da-bing, ba-da-boom)
(Dracula)

[Verse 1: Tame Impala, JENNIE, Tame Impala & JENNIE]
The morning light is turning blue, the feeling is bizarre (Bizarre)
The night is almost over, I still don't know where you are
The shadows, yeah, they keep me pretty like a movie star
Daylight makes me feel like Dracula (Dracula)

[Refrain: Tame Impala & JENNIE]
In the end, I hope it's you and me (You and me)
In the darkness, I would never leave (Never leave)
You won't ever see me in the light of day
It's far too late, the time has come

[Verse 2: Tame Impala, JENNIE, Tame Impala & JENNIE]
I'm on the verge of caving in, I run back to the dark (Dark)
Now I'm Mr. Charisma, fuckin' Pablo Escobar
My friends are saying, "Shut up, Jennie, just get in the car" (Hahaha; Jennie)
I just wanna be right where you are (Oh, my love)

[Refrain: Tame Impala & JENNIE, JENNIE, Tame Impala]
In the end, I hope it's you and me (You and me)
In the darkness, I would never leave (Never leave; I won't leave her)
We both saw this moment comin' from afar (Comin' from afar)
Now here we are (Here we are)

[Chorus: JENNIE & Tame Impala]
Run from the sunlight, Dracula
Run from the sunlight, Dracula
Run from the sunlight, Dracula (Run from the sun)
Isn't the view spectacular? (Dracula; Dracula)

[Verse 3: JENNIE & Tame Impala]
Hey, Kevin, what's up? (Haha)
Come pull up in my spot
Let's keep the night glowing
I don't ever wanna stop (Hahaha)
I'll never leave this floor, got me needin' more (Oh)
Sky is turning blue, let it clear the smoke
Lip-stain on the rim, bass is 'bout to blow (Oh)
Sinking in my teeth, I buy time

[Bridge: Tame Impala & JENNIE]
But please, do you think about what it might mean? (Mean)
'Cause I dream about you in my sleep
Would you ever love someone like me (Someone like me)
Like me? (Oh)


[Refrain: Tame Impala & JENNIE, JENNIE]
In the end, I hope it's you and me (Oh, my love)
In the darkness, I would never leave
We both saw this moment comin' from afar (Comin' from afar)
Now here we are (Here we are)

[Chorus: Tame Impala & JENNIE, Tame Impala, JENNIE]
So run from the sunlight, Dracula
So run from the sunlight, Dracula
Run from the sunlight, Dracula
Isn't the view spectacular?
So run from the sunlight, Dracula
Run from the sunlight, Dracula
Isn't the view spectacular? (Run from the sunlight, Dracula)
Run from the sunlight, Dracula (Run from the sunlight, Dracula)
Run from the sunlight, Dracula (Run from the sunlight, Dracula)
Isn't the view spectacular?
｡･:*˚:✧｡ ｡･:*˚:✧｡ ｡･:*˚:✧｡｡･:*˚:✧｡｡･:*˚:✧｡

[Verse 1]
Touch my body tender
'Cause the feeling makes me weak
Kicking off the covers
I see the ceiling while you're looking down at me

[Chorus]
How can we go back to being friends
When we just shared a bed?
How can you look at me and pretend
I'm someone you've never met?

[Verse 2]
It was last December
You were layin' on my chest
I still remember
I was scared to take a breath
Didn't want you to movе your head

[Chorus]
How can we go back to being friеnds
When we just shared a bed? (Yeah)
How can you look at me and pretend
I'm someone you've never met?

[Bridge]
The devil in your eyes
Won't deny the lies you've sold
I'm holding on too tight
While you let go
This is casual

[Chorus]
How can we go back to being friends
When we just shared a bed? (Yeah)
How can you look at me and pretend
I'm someone you've never met?
How can we go back to being friends
When we just shared a bed? (Yeah)
How can you look at me and pretend
I'm someone you've never met?

[Outro]
I'm someone you've never met (Yeah)
